plan.title: HTML5 Web Version — Browser-Side Inference + API Hybrid Architecture

tasks.description: Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript project in web_ui/ directory with production build configuration, dev server proxy to FastAPI backend, and project structure (src/pages, src/components, src/lib, src/styles, src/types)
tasks.acceptance: web_ui/ directory exists with working dev server, TypeScript compilation succeeds, directory structure matches convention

tasks.description: Implement the design token system by translating the existing theme.py ColorTokens, TypeScale, and Spacing classes into CSS custom properties and a typed theme context (React context provider with dark/light mode toggle via prefers-color-scheme)
tasks.acceptance: CSS custom properties map 1:1 to theme.py tokens, dark/light mode toggles instantly via React context, no page reload required

tasks.description: Build the application shell with navigation rail (Chat, Documents, Settings pages), responsive layout, global keyboard shortcut handler (Ctrl+Enter, Ctrl+L, Ctrl+,), and toast notification system
tasks.acceptance: Navigation between all 4 pages works, keyboard shortcuts fire correct actions, toast notifications render for success/error/info states

phases.name: API Foundation — SSE Streaming and Batch Upload

tasks.description: Add SSE streaming endpoint to the FastAPI backend that wires the existing stream_callback from LLM interface through to Server-Sent Events, along with batch file upload endpoint accepting multiple files per request and settings persistence endpoints (GET/PUT /settings)
tasks.acceptance: GET /ask/stream returns SSE event stream with token-by-token responses, POST /ingest/files accepts multipart multi-file upload, GET/PUT /settings persist and retrieve configuration

tasks.description: Build the TypeScript API client layer with typed request/response interfaces for all FastAPI endpoints, SSE streaming consumer using EventSource, authentication interceptor using existing JWT system, and connection error handling with offline detection
tasks.acceptance: All backend endpoints callable from TypeScript with type-safe interfaces, SSE stream renders tokens in real-time, 401 errors trigger auth flow, offline state detected and surfaced to UI

tasks.description: Add tests for the new FastAPI endpoints (SSE streaming, batch upload, settings CRUD) covering success cases, error cases (invalid files, auth failures), and streaming interruption scenarios
tasks.acceptance: pytest tests pass for all new endpoints including SSE streaming behavior, batch upload with mixed valid/invalid files, and settings persistence

tasks.description: Implement the chat page with message list (user/assistant bubbles with markdown rendering), message input with send button and Ctrl+Enter shortcut, streaming token display via SSE or WebLLM, typing indicator animation, and AbortController-based cancellation
tasks.acceptance: User can type question, see streamed response token-by-token, cancel in-progress generation, view full conversation history with proper styling

tasks.description: Add source citation pills to chat responses with expandable snippet view, copy-to-clipboard for individual messages and source passages, two-click confirm for clear chat history (React state + setTimeout), and empty state guidance
tasks.acceptance: Source citations render inline in responses, clicking expands to show source passage text, copy buttons work for messages and sources, clear chat requires two-click confirmation

tasks.description: Implement the inference mode architecture: React context for mode state (browser-local vs API), mode toggle in chat header, runtime switching without session loss, model readiness gate that blocks chat until model is loaded in browser mode, and server connectivity check for API mode
tasks.acceptance: Mode toggle switches between browser-local and API without losing chat history, browser mode shows loading state until model ready, API mode detects unreachable server and surfaces error

tasks.description: Port the document extraction logic from document_processor.py to TypeScript: PDF extraction via pdfjs-dist, DOCX extraction via mammoth.js, XLSX extraction via SheetJS, TXT/MD extraction, and PPTX text-only extraction via jszip + XML parsing
tasks.acceptance: Each format extracts text content matching Python equivalent quality for PDF/DOCX/XLSX/TXT, PPTX extracts slide text, all parsers handle encoding edge cases

tasks.description: Port the semantic chunking algorithm from document_processor.py to TypeScript: paragraph/sentence boundary detection, configurable overlap, abbreviation protection, page mapping for PDFs, and document ID generation (SHA256 hash)
tasks.acceptance: Chunking output is functionally equivalent to Python version for same input, overlap works correctly, abbreviation markers preserved, PDF page numbers tracked per chunk

tasks.description: Build the Documents page UI with drag-and-drop upload zone, file picker input, multi-file progress tracking, per-file status indicators (pending/parsing/indexed/error), document list with delete capability, and IndexedDB persistence for document metadata and chunks
tasks.acceptance: Drag-and-drop and file picker both work, progress shown per file, errors reported individually without blocking other files, documents persist across page reloads via IndexedDB

tasks.description: Integrate Transformers.js for embedding generation using bge-small-en-v1.5 ONNX model, with model caching via OPFS/IndexedDB, batch encoding support, and memory-efficient processing for 16GB RAM target hardware
tasks.acceptance: Embeddings generated client-side matching Python bge-small-en-v1.5 output within acceptable tolerance, model cached after first load, batch encoding works for large document sets

tasks.description: Implement in-browser vector search using EdgeVec (Rust/WASM HNSW) for semantic similarity, FlexSearch for BM25 keyword search, and Reciprocal Rank Fusion to combine both result sets — porting the hybrid retrieval logic from vector_store.py
tasks.acceptance: HNSW index builds and queries correctly, BM25 index supports incremental additions, RRF fusion produces ranked results consistent with Python implementation, index persists to IndexedDB

tasks.description: Implement optional cross-encoder reranking via Transformers.js MiniLM-L-6 model, with conditional activation (enabled for smaller document sets, disabled for large sets to save memory), and integrate into the retrieval pipeline
tasks.acceptance: Reranking improves result quality over unranked retrieval when enabled, gracefully degrades when memory is insufficient, pipeline works correctly with reranking disabled

tasks.description: Add memory-aware model selection logic: detect available device memory via browser APIs, select appropriate embedding model and LLM based on memory budget (accounting for vector index size, browser heap, OS overhead), and surface memory-pressure indicator to user
tasks.acceptance: Model selection adapts to available memory, does not crash on 16GB target hardware with full vector index loaded, user sees which model is selected and available memory

tasks.description: Integrate @mlc-ai/web-llm for browser-side LLM inference with model loading/caching via OPFS, GPU adapter detection with WASM fallback, model download progress with resumable transfers, and streaming token output wired to the chat UI
tasks.acceptance: WebLLM loads and generates responses in browser, streaming tokens render in chat UI, GPU detection works with fallback, model downloads show progress and resume on interruption

tasks.description: Build the complete browser-local RAG pipeline: query processing → embedding generation → hybrid vector search → optional reranking → context assembly → LLM prompt construction → streaming generation, matching the existing RAGEngine orchestration from rag_engine.py
tasks.acceptance: Full RAG pipeline executes entirely in-browser with no network requests, answer quality is consistent with server API mode for same documents, source citations generated from in-browser retrieval

tasks.description: Implement WebGPU context loss detection and recovery: listen for contextlost events, attempt automatic model reload, display recovery prompt to user if automatic recovery fails, and handle tab visibility changes to suspend/resume inference gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Background tab GPU context loss detected on return, model reloads automatically or shows recovery prompt, no crashes or corrupted state after context loss

tasks.description: Implement the model readiness gate: block all RAG functionality (chat, search) until required models (LLM + embeddings) are loaded, show model loading state in UI, allow configuration of which models to download (default vs high-quality), and handle storage quota exceeded errors gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Chat and search disabled until model ready state, loading UI shows download progress, user can select between default (SmolLM3-3B) and high-quality (Gemma 4 E2B) models, storage quota errors handled with clear guidance

tasks.description: Build the Settings page with inference mode configuration (browser-local vs API), server endpoint URL field with connectivity test, model selection (default/high-quality), theme toggle, and all preferences persisted to IndexedDB
tasks.acceptance: All settings render and persist across sessions, server connectivity test works, model selection triggers appropriate download, theme toggle applies instantly

tasks.description: Add cross-browser compatibility handling: Chrome/Edge full support, Firefox graceful degradation with reduced WebGPU features, Safari WebGPU detection with clear fallback guidance, and browser feature detection on page load
tasks.acceptance: App works fully on Chrome/Edge, loads with degraded features on Firefox, shows clear guidance on Safari for WebGPU limitations, no crashes on any supported browser

tasks.description: Production polish: loading skeletons and empty states for all pages, error boundary components, responsive layout adjustments for tablet viewport, and accessibility basics (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management)
tasks.acceptance: Loading states shown during async operations, empty states guide users to take action, error boundaries catch and display errors gracefully, all interactive elements keyboard-navigable

tasks.description: Browser ML feasibility spike: create a standalone test page that loads Transformers.js (bge-small-en-v1.5), EdgeVec (HNSW vector search), and FlexSearch (BM25 keyword search), validates each works on target hardware (12th-gen i5 / 16GB RAM), measures memory usage and query latency, and confirms the offline-first pipeline is viable before committing to Phase 5 implementation
tasks.acceptance: EdgeVec HNSW index builds and queries in browser within 100ms for 1000 vectors, Transformers.js loads bge-small-en-v1.5 ONNX and produces embeddings within acceptable tolerance of Python version, combined pipeline works in a standalone test page

phases.name: Chat Page and Inference Mode Architecture

tasks.description: Implement the chat message list component with user/assistant bubble styling, markdown rendering for assistant responses, message input with send button, and AbortController-based generation cancellation
tasks.acceptance: Message list renders user/assistant bubbles with markdown, message input sends on Enter or Ctrl+Enter, AbortController cancels in-progress generation, empty state shows when no messages

tasks.description: Add source citation pills to chat responses with expandable snippet view, copy-to-clipboard for individual messages and source passages, two-click confirm for clear chat history (React state + setTimeout), and empty state guidance
tasks.acceptance: Source citations render inline in responses, clicking expands to show source passage text, copy buttons work for messages and sources, clear chat requires two-click confirmation

tasks.description: Implement the inference mode architecture: React context for mode state (browser-local vs API), mode toggle in chat header, runtime switching without session loss, model readiness gate that blocks chat until model is loaded in browser mode, and server connectivity check for API mode
tasks.acceptance: Mode toggle switches between browser-local and API without losing chat history, browser mode shows loading state until model ready, API mode detects unreachable server and surfaces error

tasks.description: Implement the streaming token display layer: SSE token consumer that feeds tokens to chat message state, WebLLM token consumer wired to same message state, typing indicator CSS animation, and batched DOM updates to prevent jank during rapid token arrival
tasks.acceptance: Streaming tokens render token-by-token from both SSE source and WebLLM source, typing indicator shows during generation, no UI jank during rapid token updates

tasks.description: Implement PDF text extraction using pdfjs-dist: load PDF from File API, extract text content per page, track page numbers for chunk-to-page mapping, handle encrypted and malformed PDFs gracefully
tasks.acceptance: PDF text extraction produces output matching Python pdfplumber for standard documents, page numbers tracked per extraction

tasks.description: Implement DOCX extraction via mammoth.js (paragraphs + tables), XLSX extraction via SheetJS (sheet/row structure), and TXT/MD extraction with multiple encoding fallback (UTF-8, Latin-1, Windows-1252)
tasks.acceptance: DOCX extraction matches python-docx output for paragraphs and tables, XLSX extraction preserves sheet/row structure, TXT/MD handles multiple encodings

tasks.description: Implement PPTX text-only extraction via jszip + XML parsing: open PPTX as ZIP, parse slide XML files (ppt/slides/slideN.xml), extract text content preserving slide order, handle missing slides and empty presentations
tasks.acceptance: PPTX slide text extracted from slide XML, handles missing slides and empty presentations gracefully

tasks.description: Port the semantic chunking algorithm from document_processor.py to TypeScript: paragraph/sentence boundary detection, configurable overlap, abbreviation protection via null-marker substitution, page mapping for PDFs, and document ID generation (SHA256 hash of file content)
tasks.acceptance: Chunking output is functionally equivalent to Python version for same input, overlap works correctly, abbreviation markers preserved, PDF page numbers tracked per chunk

tasks.description: Build the Documents page UI with drag-and-drop upload zone, file picker input, multi-file progress tracking, per-file status indicators (pending/parsing/indexed/error), document list with delete capability, and IndexedDB persistence for document metadata and chunks
tasks.acceptance: Drag-and-drop and file picker both work, progress shown per file, errors reported individually without blocking other files, documents persist across page reloads via IndexedDB

tasks.description: Integrate Transformers.js for embedding generation using bge-small-en-v1.5 ONNX model: model loading with OPFS/IndexedDB caching, single and batch encode methods, memory-efficient processing with document chunking, and model readiness detection
tasks.acceptance: Embeddings generated client-side matching Python bge-small-en-v1.5 output within acceptable tolerance, model cached after first load via OPFS, batch encoding works for large document sets without OOM on 16GB target

tasks.description: Implement HNSW vector index using EdgeVec (Rust/WASM): index creation with configurable M/efConstruction parameters, add/remove vectors, k-nearest-neighbor queries with cosine similarity, index serialization to IndexedDB, and index deserialization on page reload
tasks.acceptance: HNSW index builds and queries correctly for up to 10k vectors, index persists to IndexedDB and reloads without rebuild, cosine similarity results match expected rankings

tasks.description: Implement BM25 keyword search using FlexSearch: index creation with stop-word filtering, incremental document addition, query with relevance scoring, and result serialization
tasks.acceptance: BM25 index supports incremental additions, tokenization matches Python BM25Index behavior, queries return ranked results consistent with Python implementation

tasks.description: Port the Reciprocal Rank Fusion logic from utils.py to TypeScript: merge ranked results from HNSW and BM25 with configurable k parameter, handle missing scores, and produce unified ranked result set
tasks.acceptance: RRF fusion produces ranked results consistent with Python utils.rrf_fuse implementation, configurable k parameter, handles empty result sets from either retriever

tasks.description: Implement optional cross-encoder reranking via Transformers.js MiniLM-L-6 model: conditional activation based on document set size and available memory, rerank top-k results, integrate into the retrieval pipeline as a post-fusion step
tasks.acceptance: Reranking improves result quality over unranked retrieval when enabled, gracefully degrades when memory is insufficient, pipeline works correctly with reranking disabled

tasks.description: Add memory-aware model selection logic: detect available device memory via navigator.deviceMemory and performance.measure, select appropriate embedding model based on memory budget (accounting for vector index size, browser heap, OS overhead), and surface memory-pressure indicator to user
tasks.acceptance: Model selection adapts to available memory, does not crash on 16GB target hardware with full vector index loaded, user sees which model is selected and available memory via indicator

tasks.description: Integrate @mlc-ai/web-llm for browser-side LLM inference: model loading with OPFS caching, GPU adapter detection via navigator.gpu with WASM fallback message, basic prompt/completion API, and streaming token output
tasks.acceptance: WebLLM loads specified model (SmolLM3-3B default) in browser, generates responses with streaming token output, GPU adapter detection works with WASM fallback message

tasks.description: Implement model download management: progress tracking (bytes, speed, ETA), resumable downloads via Range requests, OPFS cache write after download completion, storage quota exceeded error handling with user guidance, and model selection UI (SmolLM3-3B default, Gemma 4 E2B high-quality opt-in)
tasks.acceptance: Model download shows bytes transferred vs total, transfer speed, estimated time remaining, download resumes after interruption, completion triggers cache to OPFS

tasks.description: Implement the model readiness gate: block all RAG functionality until required models (LLM + embeddings) are loaded, show model loading state in UI, allow configuration of which models to download, and handle storage quota exceeded errors gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Chat and search disabled until model ready state, loading UI shows download progress and model initialization status, user can select between default and high-quality models, storage quota errors handled with clear guidance

tasks.description: Build the complete browser-local RAG orchestrator: query preprocessing, embedding generation via Transformers.js, hybrid vector search (HNSW + BM25 + RRF), optional reranking, context assembly with truncation, LLM prompt construction, and streaming generation via WebLLM — matching the RAGEngine orchestration from rag_engine.py
tasks.acceptance: Full RAG pipeline executes entirely in-browser with no network requests after model loaded, answer quality consistent with server API mode for same documents, source citations generated from in-browser retrieval

tasks.description: Implement WebGPU context loss detection and recovery: listen for contextlost events on GPU device, attempt automatic model reload with timeout, display recovery prompt to user if automatic recovery fails, and handle tab visibility changes to suspend/resume inference gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Background tab GPU context loss detected on return, model reloads automatically or shows recovery prompt, no crashes or corrupted state after context loss, tab visibility changes suspend/resume inference

tasks.description: Build the Settings page with inference mode configuration (browser-local vs API), server endpoint URL field with connectivity test, model selection (default/high-quality), theme toggle, and all preferences persisted to IndexedDB
tasks.acceptance: All settings render and persist across sessions, server connectivity test works, model selection triggers appropriate download, theme toggle applies instantly

tasks.description: Add cross-browser compatibility handling: Chrome/Edge full support, Firefox graceful degradation with reduced WebGPU features, Safari WebGPU detection with clear fallback guidance, and browser feature detection on page load
tasks.acceptance: App works fully on Chrome/Edge, loads with degraded features on Firefox, shows clear guidance on Safari for WebGPU limitations, no crashes on any supported browser

tasks.description: Production polish: loading skeletons and empty states for all pages, error boundary components, responsive layout adjustments for tablet viewport, accessibility basics (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management), and verification of SC-011 (50MB PDF on 16GB target) and SC-006 (minimum hardware compliance)
tasks.acceptance: Loading states shown during async operations, empty states guide users to take action, error boundaries catch and display errors gracefully, all interactive elements keyboard-navigable, 50MB PDF upload works on 16GB target hardware

tasks.acceptance: Source citations render inline in responses, clicking expands to show source passage text, copy buttons work for messages and sources, clear chat requires two-click confirmation

tasks.description: Implement the inference mode architecture: React context for mode state (browser-local vs API), mode toggle in chat header, runtime switching without session loss, model readiness gate that blocks chat until model is loaded in browser mode, and server connectivity check for API mode
tasks.acceptance: Mode toggle switches between browser-local and API without losing chat history, browser mode shows loading state until model ready, API mode detects unreachable server and surfaces error

tasks.description: Implement the streaming token display layer: SSE token consumer that feeds tokens to chat message state, WebLLM token consumer wired to same message state, typing indicator CSS animation, and batched DOM updates to prevent jank during rapid token arrival
tasks.acceptance: Streaming tokens render token-by-token from both SSE source and WebLLM source, typing indicator shows during generation, no UI jank during rapid token updates

tasks.description: Implement PDF text extraction using pdfjs-dist: load PDF from File API, extract text content per page, track page numbers for chunk-to-page mapping, handle encrypted and malformed PDFs gracefully
tasks.acceptance: PDF text extraction produces output matching Python pdfplumber for standard documents, page numbers tracked per extraction

tasks.description: Implement DOCX extraction via mammoth.js (paragraphs + tables), XLSX extraction via SheetJS (sheet/row structure), and TXT/MD extraction with multiple encoding fallback (UTF-8, Latin-1, Windows-1252)
tasks.acceptance: DOCX extraction matches python-docx output for paragraphs and tables, XLSX extraction preserves sheet/row structure, TXT/MD handles multiple encodings

tasks.description: Implement PPTX text-only extraction via jszip + XML parsing: open PPTX as ZIP, parse slide XML files (ppt/slides/slideN.xml), extract text content preserving slide order, handle missing slides and empty presentations
tasks.acceptance: PPTX slide text extracted from slide XML, handles missing slides and empty presentations gracefully

tasks.description: Port the semantic chunking algorithm from document_processor.py to TypeScript: paragraph/sentence boundary detection, configurable overlap, abbreviation protection via null-marker substitution, page mapping for PDFs, and document ID generation (SHA256 hash of file content)
tasks.acceptance: Chunking output is functionally equivalent to Python version for same input, overlap works correctly, abbreviation markers preserved, PDF page numbers tracked per chunk

tasks.description: Build the Documents page UI with drag-and-drop upload zone, file picker input, multi-file progress tracking, per-file status indicators (pending/parsing/indexed/error), document list with delete capability, and IndexedDB persistence for document metadata and chunks
tasks.acceptance: Drag-and-drop and file picker both work, progress shown per file, errors reported individually without blocking other files, documents persist across page reloads via IndexedDB

tasks.description: Integrate Transformers.js for embedding generation using bge-small-en-v1.5 ONNX model: model loading with OPFS/IndexedDB caching, single and batch encode methods, memory-efficient processing with document chunking, and model readiness detection
tasks.acceptance: Embeddings generated client-side matching Python bge-small-en-v1.5 output within acceptable tolerance, model cached after first load via OPFS, batch encoding works for large document sets without OOM on 16GB target

tasks.description: Implement HNSW vector index using EdgeVec (Rust/WASM): index creation with configurable M/efConstruction parameters, add/remove vectors, k-nearest-neighbor queries with cosine similarity, index serialization to IndexedDB, and index deserialization on page reload
tasks.acceptance: HNSW index builds and queries correctly for up to 10k vectors, index persists to IndexedDB and reloads without rebuild, cosine similarity results match expected rankings

tasks.description: Implement BM25 keyword search using FlexSearch: index creation with stop-word filtering, incremental document addition, query with relevance scoring, and result serialization
tasks.acceptance: BM25 index supports incremental additions, tokenization matches Python BM25Index behavior, queries return ranked results consistent with Python implementation

tasks.description: Port the Reciprocal Rank Fusion logic from utils.py to TypeScript: merge ranked results from HNSW and BM25 with configurable k parameter, handle missing scores, and produce unified ranked result set
tasks.acceptance: RRF fusion produces ranked results consistent with Python utils.rrf_fuse implementation, configurable k parameter, handles empty result sets from either retriever

tasks.description: Implement optional cross-encoder reranking via Transformers.js MiniLM-L-6 model: conditional activation based on document set size and available memory, rerank top-k results, integrate into the retrieval pipeline as a post-fusion step
tasks.acceptance: Reranking improves result quality over unranked retrieval when enabled, gracefully degrades when memory is insufficient, pipeline works correctly with reranking disabled

tasks.description: Add memory-aware model selection logic: detect available device memory via navigator.deviceMemory and performance.measure, select appropriate embedding model based on memory budget (accounting for vector index size, browser heap, OS overhead), and surface memory-pressure indicator to user
tasks.acceptance: Model selection adapts to available memory, does not crash on 16GB target hardware with full vector index loaded, user sees which model is selected and available memory via indicator

tasks.description: Integrate @mlc-ai/web-llm for browser-side LLM inference: model loading with OPFS caching, GPU adapter detection via navigator.gpu with WASM fallback message, basic prompt/completion API, and streaming token output
tasks.acceptance: WebLLM loads specified model (SmolLM3-3B default) in browser, generates responses with streaming token output, GPU adapter detection works with WASM fallback message

tasks.description: Implement model download management: progress tracking (bytes, speed, ETA), resumable downloads via Range requests, OPFS cache write after download completion, storage quota exceeded error handling with user guidance, and model selection UI (SmolLM3-3B default, Gemma 4 E2B high-quality opt-in)
tasks.acceptance: Model download shows bytes transferred vs total, transfer speed, estimated time remaining, download resumes after interruption, completion triggers cache to OPFS

tasks.description: Implement the model readiness gate: block all RAG functionality until required models (LLM + embeddings) are loaded, show model loading state in UI, allow configuration of which models to download, and handle storage quota exceeded errors gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Chat and search disabled until model ready state, loading UI shows download progress and model initialization status, user can select between default and high-quality models, storage quota errors handled with clear guidance

tasks.description: Build the complete browser-local RAG orchestrator: query preprocessing, embedding generation via Transformers.js, hybrid vector search (HNSW + BM25 + RRF), optional reranking, context assembly with truncation, LLM prompt construction, and streaming generation via WebLLM — matching the RAGEngine orchestration from rag_engine.py
tasks.acceptance: Full RAG pipeline executes entirely in-browser with no network requests after model loaded, answer quality consistent with server API mode for same documents, source citations generated from in-browser retrieval

tasks.description: Implement WebGPU context loss detection and recovery: listen for contextlost events on GPU device, attempt automatic model reload with timeout, display recovery prompt to user if automatic recovery fails, and handle tab visibility changes to suspend/resume inference gracefully
tasks.acceptance: Background tab GPU context loss detected on return, model reloads automatically or shows recovery prompt, no crashes or corrupted state after context loss, tab visibility changes suspend/resume inference

tasks.description: Build the Settings page with inference mode configuration (browser-local vs API), server endpoint URL field with connectivity test, model selection (default/high-quality), theme toggle, and all preferences persisted to IndexedDB
tasks.acceptance: All settings render and persist across sessions, server connectivity test works, model selection triggers appropriate download, theme toggle applies instantly

tasks.description: Add cross-browser compatibility handling: Chrome/Edge full support, Firefox graceful degradation with reduced WebGPU features, Safari WebGPU detection with clear fallback guidance, and browser feature detection on page load
tasks.acceptance: App works fully on Chrome/Edge, loads with degraded features on Firefox, shows clear guidance on Safari for WebGPU limitations, no crashes on any supported browser

tasks.description: Production polish: loading skeletons and empty states for all pages, error boundary components, responsive layout adjustments for tablet viewport, accessibility basics (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management), and verification of SC-011 (50MB PDF on 16GB target) and SC-006 (minimum hardware compliance)
tasks.acceptance: Loading states shown during async operations, empty states guide users to take action, error boundaries catch and display errors gracefully, all interactive elements keyboard-navigable, 50MB PDF upload works on 16GB target hardware

approval.summary: Phase 1 implemented the project scaffold and theme foundation. All 3 tasks (1.1 project init, 1.2 design tokens, 1.3 app shell) are aligned with the spec. FR-001 (browser access), FR-010 (visual theme system), FR-012 (keyboard shortcuts) are addressed. No spec drift detected.

Build the Documents page UI with drag-and-drop upload zone, file picker input, multi-file progress tracking, per-file status indicators, document list with delete capability, and IndexedDB persistence
Integrate Transformers.js for embedding generation using bge-small-en-v1.5 ONNX model: model loading with OPFS/IndexedDB caching, single and batch encode methods, memory-efficient processing

Implement BM25 keyword search using FlexSearch: index creation with stop-word filtering, incremental document addition, query with relevance scoring
Port Reciprocal Rank Fusion from utils.py to TypeScript: merge ranked results from HNSW and BM25 with configurable k parameter
Implement optional cross-encoder reranking via Transformers.js MiniLM-L-6 model with conditional activation based on document set size and memory
Add memory-aware model selection logic: detect available device memory, select appropriate model based on budget, surface memory-pressure indicator
Integrate @mlc-ai/web-llm for browser-side LLM inference: model loading with OPFS caching, GPU adapter detection with WASM fallback, basic prompt/completion API
Implement model download management: progress tracking, resumable downloads, OPFS cache write, storage quota error handling, model selection UI

Build complete browser-local RAG orchestrator: query preprocessing, embedding, hybrid search, optional reranking, context assembly, LLM prompt construction, streaming generation

No drift detected.
